title: [Bug]: Complex CAST operations used as predicates are encountering an Internal Error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_casts (id, value) VALUES (1, 0.7646335288457784), (2, NULL);
SELECT (- (CAST(value AS INTEGER)) + 1) FROM test_casts WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT TRUE WHERE (- (CAST(value AS INTEGER))) < (- (CAST(0.7646335288457784 AS TIMESTAMP));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_casts WHERE created_at < NULL;
key_bug_features: Complex CAST operations as predicates causing internal error
